channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Utah runs road winning streak to six straight with 4-3 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club has become true road warriors. Clayton Keller scored a power-play goal with 43.8 seconds remaining and the Utah Hockey Club rallied to beat the San Jose Sharks 4-3 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Prep roundup: Jasir Rencher’s clutch shot lifts Riordan over Salesian to win Gridley Invitational Tournament
item.description: Bay Area prep basketball: Riordan defeats Salesian to win Gridley Invitational Tournament. De La Salle, Campolindo, Acalanes girls win Saturday games.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Blake Horvath shines as Navy dominates in a 31-13 victory over Bryson Daily and No. 19 Army
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (AP) — This was an Army-Navy game unlike any before it. The teams had combined for 19 victories this season before their annual clash, a record for the rivalry. Of course, only one of them would be responsible for No. 20 — the biggest win of them all. “I think they're like us.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs set for season-ending knee surgery, AP sources say
item.description: AP Pro Football Writer (AP) — Dallas Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs is set for season-ending surgery on his left knee to deal with an issue that was about to sideline him for the third time in four games, two people with knowledge of the decision said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rowdy Lions fan banned from NFL stadiums, has season tickets revoked after confrontation with Packers coach
item.description: One Detroit Lions fan is facing serious consequences after he got into a shouting match with Green Bay Packers head coach Matt LaFleur during the teams' Week 14 matchup.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump, close allies attend Army-Navy rivalry game
item.description: As national concerns about the drones spotted on the East Coast continue to mount, President-elect Trump is attending the Army-Navy game.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, NewsNation

item.title: One San Jose Sharks forward returns, another is placed on IR
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks activate Will Smith before facing the Utah Hockey Club on Saturday to open a three-game homestand
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Boise State star Ashton Jeanty goes viral as the only Heisman finalist to rep their school
item.description: Boise State running back Ashton Jeanty has certainly secured the public's vote ahead of the Heisman Trophy award ceremony as he was the only finalist to rep his school on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Joel Embiid sustains sinus fracture fighting for rebound, misses 2nd half of 76ers' loss to Pacers
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Joel Embiid sustained a sinus fracture when he was struck in the face going for a defensive rebound late in the first half of the Philadelphia 76ers’ loss to the Indiana Pacers on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cubs acquire All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in trade with the Astros
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Chicago Cubs acquired All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in a trade with the Houston Astros on Friday, paying a big price for one of baseball's best hitters.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fencing organization pens open letter to USFA over concerns about trans athletes, stances on abortion and DEI
item.description: Fair Fencing Organization (FFO) penned a letter to USA Fencing this week over concerns about the governing body's stance on trans athletes and DEI, and its criteria for site selection.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Duke lacrosse players' rape accuser admits she lied
item.description: The former exotic dancer confessed to lying about the encounter in 2006 during her appearance on the “Let’s Talk with Kat” podcast.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: 49ers player refused to enter game when called on, Shanahan says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (KRON) -- San Francisco 49ers linebacker De'Vondre Campbell refused to enter the game when Kyle Shanahan attempted to put him in on Thursday night, Shanahan said. Campbell instead went to the locker room. The incident happened in the third quarter.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: 49ers' playoff hopes dealt critical blow with loss to Rams
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (KRON) -- The San Francisco 49ers' chances of making the playoffs are in serious peril after they lost 12-6 to the Los Angeles Rams on Thursday night. The 49ers (6-8) now sit 2.5 games behind the NFC West-leading Seattle Seahawks (8-5). The Rams improved to 8-6 with their win.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Oregon Ducks 'screwed' by CFP committee, Fox Sports analyst says
item.description: Joel Klatt, Fox Sports top college football analyst, blasted the CFP committee, claiming they did a "horrendous" job with their selections.
item.dc:creator: Matt Rawlings, NewsNation

item.title: Report: Suzuki in trade talks with Astros for Kyle Tucker
item.description: CHICAGO— The hot stove is heading up for the Chicago Cubs during the 2024 Winter Meetings and the club is reportedly in trade talks for one of the best outfielders in baseball — Kyle Tucker.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Buccaneers & Habitat Hillsborough join forces for Holiday Home Build and Revival
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers and Habitat for Humanity of Hillsborough joined forces once again to address affordable housing in Hillsborough County.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: SJ Earthquakes welcome 3 new players in deadline trade
item.description: (KRON) – Three players have been traded to the San Jose Earthquakes, the team announced Monday. Defender Dave Romney and midfielders Ian Harkes and Mark-Anthony Kaye will be making their way to Silicon Valley from the New England Revolution.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Top-rated recruit AJ Dybantsa chooses BYU
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The definitive #1 rated basketball recruit in the entire country is coming to BYU. AJ Dybantsa, a 6-foot-9 forward, announced on ESPN Tuesday that he is committing to play basketball for the Cougars starting in the 2025-26 season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Silver Pigskin Finalist starts at Quarterback for Iowa Hawkeyes
item.description: Most walk-on players in college football never get the opportunity to take the field, especially not at quarterback, and certainly not for a Power Four football program like the Iowa Hawkeyes. But La Jolla alum Jackson Stratton has done just that.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: How to watch 'Monday Night Football' in 'The Simpsons' universe
item.description: The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Embiid scores 31 in his return, Maxey has his first triple-double, Sixers beat Bulls 108-100
item.description: Joel Embiid had 31 points and 12 rebounds in his return, Tyrese Maxey got his first career triple-double and the Philadelphia 76ers held on to beat the Chicago Bulls 108-100 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Juan Soto's $765M deal with the Mets is the largest in MLB history. Here's who he passed
item.description: Juan Soto and the New York Mets agreed to a record $765 million, 15-year contract Sunday night, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
